benefits.description: Ipamorelin increases food intake and appetite; can help counteract appetite suppression from GLP-1 agents

protocol_notes: References a friend's year-long A/B testing study comparing fasted vs non-fasted administration of Tesamorelin/Ipamorelin. Repeated IGF-1 testing showed better response with meals rather than fasted. Notes that Tesamorelin (Theratechnologies pharma product) does not recommend fasting. Discusses that GHRP/Ipamorelin can increase appetite (contrary to community belief) and may be useful for bulking when combined with GLP-1 agents like Retatrutide which suppress appetite.
